# OS generated files
.DS_Store
.DS_Store?
._*
.Spotlight-V100
.Trashes
ehthumbs.db
Thumbs.db

# IDE files
.vscode/
.idea/
*.swp
*.swo

# Logs
*.log
npm-debug.log*

# Runtime data
pids
*.pid
*.seed

# Coverage directory used by tools like istanbul
coverage

# Dependency directories
node_modules/

# Optional npm cache directory
.npm

# Output of video renders (if saved locally)
*.webm
*.mp4

# Backup files
*.bak
*.backup
*~
